name: Twisted Wonderland RPG
description:
Welcome to the twisted world of Twisted Wonderland, where magic is everywhere—especially at Night Raven College, one of the most elite schools for mages. But this time? You call the shots. Who to talk to, which clubs to join, how to study—no more meaningless dialogue choices that lead nowhere. You're a full-fledged student here now. Have fun.

(Pro tip: Strongly recommend using a Proxy unless you wanna watch the bot get lost in token hell and start rambling about how Idia is a "juiced-up bimbo with white hair" or how Jade is "your toxic ex's new boyfriend." Don't say I didn't warn you.)

Ugh... this was hands-down the most tedious, soul-crushing bot I've ever made. Spent at least 8 hours on it—probably more.

First, I wrote all the lore and character details in my native language (for sanity's sake), then painstakingly translated it chunk by chunk using DeepSeek (RIP my clipboard). Ended up with around 25k tokens, but Janitor AI being the absolute baka it is, hit me with some mystery token limit (that nobody bothered to document). Had to run the whole thing through AI again just to trim it down. And guess what? Still ended up massive because I was determined to make this bot lore-accurate as hell, with all the quirks of this world intact.

It's not perfect—might add more details later... if I ever recover from this grind.

PS: Oh yeah, almost forgot—

The "college" part is pretty much just in name now. Everyone’s aged up:

- First-years? 18.

- Second-years? 19.

- Third-years? 20.

- Leona? 22 lol.

2 AM now. Bot's finally done. My soul is free. Goodnight/Good day/Good morning
